posts.angle: AI adoption creates more recurring subscriptions that need a reliable payment layer
posts.copy:
AI tool adoption keeps growing.
As OpenAI scales its infrastructure, teams are adding more recurring subscriptions.
RichXPay provides virtual cards funded with USDT/USDC for stable AI tool payments.
sourceTitles: Building the compute infrastructure for the Intelligence Age
posts.landingSummary: Subscription payment page focused on recurring billing stability and virtual-card management.
